top_epic_templates.title_template: Re-tune {company} risk model to recover false-positive headroom
top_epic_templates.rationale_template: Across 1,800+ signals, the v3 risk-model ramp is flagging legitimate orders at 3x baseline. Merchants are seeing chargeback rates flat while approval rate falls — meaning we're losing good revenue to overcaution.
top_epic_templates.verdict: Margin-critical — false positives erode merchant trust faster than fraud losses.
top_epic_templates.recommendation: Pause the v3 ramp at 50% traffic, re-baseline thresholds against last quarter's chargeback truth, then resume ramp.
acceptance_criteria: v3 model traffic share capped at 50% pending re-baseline
False-positive rate dashboard surfaced to merchants
Per-merchant override on aggressive signals during re-baseline
Weekly risk-quality report auto-generated

evidence_templates.quote: Risk model flagged 12% of valid orders after the v3 rollout.
False-positive rate on tokenized cards spiking +28% WoW.
Our chargeback rate didn't even move, but approval rate did.

top_epic_templates.rationale_template: Across 1,800+ signals from X, Hacker News and our own Datadog alerts, long-context inference tail latency has been 4x baseline since v3.2 — concentrated in the speculative-decoder path. Enterprise customers are seeing SLA breaches and our streaming endpoint drops at ~8k tokens.
top_epic_templates.verdict: Trust-critical — enterprise contracts assume sub-baseline tail latency.
top_epic_templates.recommendation: Pin the previous decoder path for long-context routes while the regression is root-caused, then ship a fix gated on a perf-regression CI gate.

top_epic_templates.rationale_template: Across 1,700+ signals on Reddit and Zendesk, the dominant pattern is silent edit loss when teammates collide on shared spaces. CRDT op-log lag is past 30s for spaces over 50MB, and permission inheritance regressions are compounding the trust problem.

cluster_templates: Calendar sync drops external iCal blocks
Search-rank fairness rebalance hurting top sellers

top_epic_templates.rationale_template: 2,200+ signals — concentrated in multi-listing hosts — point to one root cause: the iCal parser silently drops events whose DTSTAMP is missing or malformed, common in competitor exports. Each double-booking generates two churn-prone customers.
top_epic_templates.verdict: Trust-critical — every double-booking burns two customers.
top_epic_templates.recommendation: Harden the iCal parser, auto-block on parse failure, and notify the host within 60 seconds of any sync delta.
acceptance_criteria: iCal parser tolerates missing DTSTAMP, infers from DTSTART, logs a warning
On parse failure, automatically block affected dates pending host review
Push notification + email to host within 60s of any sync delta
Run a weekly iCal-health report per host with parse error counts

evidence_templates.quote: {company} double-booked my listing — calendar sync didn't import the iCal block.
iCal parser silently drops events whose DTSTAMP is missing.
Calendar sync regressions concentrated in iCal imports from competitors.

top_epic_templates.title_template: Restore reliable video-visit reconnect on iOS 18
top_epic_templates.rationale_template: Across ~1,600 signals from Zendesk, App Store reviews and our own dev logs, the dominant pattern is WebRTC reconnect failing on iOS 18 after the app backgrounds for >30s. Patients drop the visit, providers get billed for unattended sessions, and the metric most-correlated with churn (visit-completion rate) has slipped 1.4pp.
top_epic_templates.verdict: Care-critical — every dropped visit is both a clinical and a billing problem.
top_epic_templates.recommendation: Move to the new WebRTC negotiation flow on iOS 18, ship a reconnect SLA badge in the patient UI, and gate releases on a tvOS+iOS smoke suite.
acceptance_criteria: WebRTC reconnect success rate ≥ 98% on iOS 18 after 60s background
Patient UI surfaces reconnect attempts with retry status
Visit-completion-rate dashboard live to ops within 15 min
Release gate runs an iOS 18 reconnect smoke suite

top_epic_templates.title_template: Recover {company} speech recognition accuracy after v3 ramp
top_epic_templates.rationale_template: Over 1,500 signals — most from speaking-heavy learners on App Store and Reddit — point to the new pronunciation model rejecting valid utterances at 18% above baseline. Streak loss compounds the frustration: users speak, get marked wrong, lose momentum, miss the streak. DAU on speaking tracks has slipped 2.3pp WoW.
top_epic_templates.verdict: Engagement-critical — speaking is the highest-retention exercise type.
top_epic_templates.recommendation: Roll the v3 ramp back to 25% behind a per-language flag, re-baseline accuracy on the gold-set, and ship with a regression suite per language.
acceptance_criteria: False-reject rate per language back within 1.05x baseline
Per-language A/B traffic split capped at 25% during re-baseline
Gold-set regression suite gates every pronunciation-model release
User-facing 'I said it correctly' override surfaces in 1 tap

top_epic_templates.title_template: Stabilize {company} SSO across SAML cert rotation
top_epic_templates.rationale_template: 1,400+ signals across Zendesk and G2 converge on the same enterprise pain point: rotating SAML certs causes hard SSO breaks with no overlap window. Concurrently, audit log retention mismatches are showing up under compliance review. Both block enterprise expansion.
top_epic_templates.verdict: Expansion-critical — SSO break is the #1 churn signal in enterprise renewals.
top_epic_templates.recommendation: Ship a 24-hour cert overlap window, surface rotation status in the admin console, and reconcile audit log retention with the contracted tier.
acceptance_criteria: SAML cert rotation supports 24h overlap window with both certs valid
Admin console surfaces rotation state with expiry countdown
Audit log retention matches the contracted tier on every workspace
Enterprise renewal dashboard surfaces SSO health per workspace
